clients.name: Synapse SPA
clients.description: Public PKCE client for the Synapse SPA (ADR-S024). Prod re-template of synapse's dev-tools/keycloak/synapse-realm.json: prod URLs, sslRequired external, no dev seed users — the issuer the app validates is https://keycloak.kakde.eu/realms/synapse (Deployment OIDC_ISSUER).
